name: gohighlevel
description: Full GoHighLevel CRM — contacts, pipelines, conversations, calendars, and workflows via the GHL API v2.

name: instantly-ai
description: Manage cold email campaigns, leads, and analytics in Instantly.ai. Email warming, outreach, reply tracking.

name: apollo
description: Prospect enrichment via Apollo.io — people search, org data, verified emails, and contact intelligence.

name: abm-outbound
description: Full ABM automation: LinkedIn → email → handwritten letter. Scrapes, enriches, and orchestrates multi-channel outreach.

name: competitor-spy
description: Instant competitive intelligence dossier on any company. Strengths, weaknesses, positioning, and threat level in minutes.

name: perplexity
description: AI-powered deep research with real citations. Grounded answers on any topic — use for anything that needs to be verifiably accurate.

name: campaign-orchestrator
description: Multi-channel follow-up sequences — coordinates email, LinkedIn, and call touchpoints in the right order.

name: lead-priority-scorer
description: Deterministic lead scoring — pulls from GHL and scores leads by fit, intent, and urgency. No guesswork.

name: cold-email-personalizer
description: Research-then-write prospecting emails. Pulls live data on the target before a single word is written.

name: campaign-copywriter
description: Copy factory using PAS, BAB, AIDA, and Hormozi frameworks. Sequences, ads, landing pages, LinkedIn — done fast.

name: marketing-strategy-pmm
description: Positioning, ICP definition, GTM strategy, competitive battlecards, and launch playbooks. April Dunford methodology built in.

name: linkedin-content
description: LinkedIn post writing with hook formulas, formatting rules, and algorithm-aware engagement patterns.

name: ghost-proposal
description: Full client proposals from a brief — Scribe + Roy + Iris deployed together. Paste the brief, get a boardroom-ready doc.

name: hubspot
description: HubSpot CRM and CMS — contacts, companies, deals, and content management for clients on HubSpot.

name: n8n-api
description: Workflow automation via n8n — build, trigger, and manage automation flows. Works with self-hosted and n8n Cloud.

name: asana
description: Project management — create tasks, update status, assign work, check deadlines. Full Asana API integration.

name: calendly
description: Pull booked calls, check availability, and trigger pre-call briefs automatically when a discovery call lands.
